dbMigrationWorker.description: Database migration worker (triggered by SQS queue)

dbMigrationRouter.description: Database migration HTTP API (POST to trigger, GET to check status)

prisma.name: ${self:service}-prisma-${sls:stage}
prisma.description: Prisma runtime client only (NO CLI) with rhel-openssl-3.0.x binaries (~10-15MB). CLI packaged separately in dbMigrate function.

Statement.Sid: Allow Dead Letter SNS to publish to SQS

Properties.GroupDescription: Security group for Frigg Lambda functions

Properties.DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for Frigg Aurora cluster

Properties.Description: Allow Lambda functions to connect to Aurora PostgreSQL (self-referencing rule)

Properties.AlarmDescription: Messages in dead-letter queue — integration queue processing failures
